title: JoyNexus: Service-Oriented Multi-Tenant Post-Training for VLA Models
innovation_summary: JoyNexus: Service-Oriented Multi-Tenant Post-Training for VLA Models: To address these challenges, we present JoyNexus, a unified service for multi-tenant VLA supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, and evaluation.
